name: planning-poker-server
description: Planning Poker backend with Socket.IO and Supabase

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='../dist/planning-poker'; const dst='dist/public'; if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.cpSync(src, dst, {recursive:true});console.log('Frontend copied to dist/public');}"
